name: obsidian-quick-capture
title: Obsidian Quick Capture
description: Quickly capture thoughts to Obsidian daily notes. Works with any vault structure and note format.
author: james

commands.name: quick-note
commands.title: Quick Note
commands.subtitle: Obsidian
commands.description: Capture a quick thought to your daily note

preferences.name: dailyNotesFolder
preferences.title: Daily Notes Folder
preferences.description: Folder within vault where daily notes are stored (leave empty for vault root)

preferences.name: dateFormat
preferences.title: Date Format
preferences.description: Format for daily note filenames (using date-fns format)

preferences.name: sectionHeader
preferences.title: Section Header
preferences.description: Section to append notes to (e.g., ## Inbox, **Notes**). Leave empty to append to end of file.

preferences.name: createNoteIfMissing
preferences.title: Create Daily Note if Missing
preferences.description: Automatically create today's daily note if it doesn't exist
preferences.label: Create note automatically
